exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your garden planning forward
items: Create a detailed soil test plan and schedule testing for all planned planting areas
Purchase and install a drip irrigation system or soaker hoses for your main growing areas
Build or install raised garden beds and fill with quality soil mix
Start seeds indoors for warm-season vegetables and flowers according to your last frost date
Create a garden maintenance schedule and set up weekly tasks for watering, weeding, and harvesting
Install physical garden barriers like row covers, cages, or fencing to protect plants from pests and weather
